title: Character / portrait lighting (professional film practice)
sources_note: Distilled from StudioBinder three-point & cinematic lighting primers, No Film School lighting techniques, film-school face-pattern teaching (Rembrandt/loop/butterfly/split), and industry motivated-practical practice. Not a paid course dump.
core_principles: Motivated light first: every key should feel like it could come from the world (window, practical, neon, monitor, searchlight).
Three-point is a teaching scaffold (key / fill / edge); on set, shape faces for story, not textbook symmetry.
Face patterns sell character psychology: which half of the face we see is a story choice.
Protect eyes unless the beat deliberately hides them (spectacles of dread, lost soul).
Contrast and color temperature are emotional instruments, not decoration.

rembrandt.look: Key ~45° up and to the side; cheek triangle of light under the eye on the shadow side

loop.look: Slightly off-axis key; small loop shadow from nose toward cheek

butterfly_paramount.look: Key high and centered; butterfly shadow under nose; glamour or controlled beauty

split.look: Half face lit, half in deep shadow

broad.look: Lit side of face toward camera; face reads larger, more open

short.look: Shadow side of face toward camera; slimming, secretive, cinematic

under.look: Key from below; uncanny, threat, horror-adjacent

top_skull.look: Overhead key; hollow eyes, exhaustion, interrogation

rim_edge.look: Back/edge separates subject from dark background; hair light optional

practical_key.look: Lamp, monitor, holo, neon, window as the visible key motivation
use: all emotions when story world has sources

three_point_roles.key: Primary modeling light; direction sells power and mood
three_point_roles.fill: Controls shadow depth; lower fill = more drama
three_point_roles.edge_or_back: Separates face from background; optional hair rim
three_point_roles.kicker: Harder edge accent for grit or neon

calm.key: soft window or warm practical as key, slightly off camera
calm.fill: generous soft fill or bounce; gentle falloff
calm.face: both eyes readable; soft cheek modeling
calm.atmosphere_en: soft open face light, calm mid-key air, gentle practical warmth
calm.atmosphere_zh: 面部柔和打开，中调平静，实用光微暖，阴影边缘软

suspicion.key: harder side key from practical; cool ambient fill
suspicion.fill: under-fill; let one cheek hide information
suspicion.edge: thin cool rim from screen or corridor
suspicion.face: half-lit, eyes still catch a specular
suspicion.atmosphere_en: half-shadow face, cool fill, secretive short lighting, tense mid-low key
suspicion.atmosphere_zh: 半明半暗的窄面光，冷辅光，眼神有一星高光，紧绷的中低调

oppression.key: hard side or top-side key; minimal fill
oppression.fill: near zero; negative fill if needed
oppression.edge: cold edge optional to pin subject in dark
oppression.face: large shadow mass; protect eye readability
oppression.atmosphere_en: oppressive hard key, crushed blacks, half-swallowed face, still-readable eyes
oppression.atmosphere_zh: 硬主光压迫，暗部深沉，半张脸吞进阴影，眼睛仍可读

revelation.key: tighter key on eyes or truth object then face
revelation.fill: controlled; raise contrast at the beat peak
revelation.face: eyes sharp, micro sweat optional, world darkens around
revelation.atmosphere_en: truth-spot key on eyes, surrounding falloff, contrast lifts on the reveal
revelation.atmosphere_zh: 真相落在眼上的收紧主光，周围下沉，反差在揭示点抬起

intimacy.face: gentle wrap, soft catchlights, skin texture alive
intimacy.atmosphere_en: warm close practical wraps the face, soft intimate glow, low contrast
intimacy.atmosphere_zh: 近处暖实用光包裹面部，柔和高光，低反差亲密感

grief.key: dim soft window or weak practical
grief.edge: minimal; let figure merge slightly with space
grief.face: soft low-key, optional wet eye specular
grief.atmosphere_en: soft dim key, desaturated grief air, quiet eye light, soft shadow edges
grief.atmosphere_zh: 偏暗柔主光，低饱和悲伤空气，安静眼神高光，阴影边缘软

dread.key: single hard motivated source; strong negative fill
dread.face: hollow sockets optional; eyes still intentional
dread.atmosphere_en: single hard source, deep negative fill, cold dread air, uncanny face modeling
dread.atmosphere_zh: 单一硬源，强负补光，冷恐惧空气，面部造型不安

prompt_priority: Lead with mood + face light pattern before gear lists
Name motivated source (window, holo ice-blue, warm lamp, xenon)
Describe shadow mass on face and eye readability
Describe air/atmosphere (haze, pool of dark, soft falloff)

object_insert_override.note: No portrait face recipes on pure object plates
object_insert_override.light: Material-readable key on paper grain / metal edge / glass / flesh sample; micro shadows for texture
